channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Adventure / Multi-Sport venues
channel.description: Latest adventure / multi-sport venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Pattaya Bike and Boat Tours
item.description: Guided bicycle + boat tour operator. Quiet back-road routes through real Thai villages, plantations, fishing communities. Small-group English-speaking tours. Bike rental also available. Naklua-based.

item.title: EasyKart Pattaya Thepprasit
item.description: Newest go-kart facility in Pattaya. Outdoor 350m beginner + 800m racing tracks. Multi-tier classes: Kids/Regular/Fast/2-Seater. From 480 baht.

item.title: Pattaya Park Water & Fun Park (Tower Jump)
item.description: Original Pattaya 1989 complex. Tower Jump (170m zip line from 56th floor) + water park + private beach + amusement park.

item.title: Thai Sky Adventures (Skydive Pattaya)
item.description: Southeast Asia only full-time skydive drop zone. 25+ years. Tandem from 13,000 ft. 60s freefall at 200 km/h. Free Pattaya pickup.

item.title: Bira Circuit (FIA Motor Racing Track)
item.description: Thailand first FIA-standard motor racing circuit. 2.41 km. 30 pit garages. 30,000 spectator capacity. SEATCZC + Asian Formula 2000 host since 1990s. Named after Prince Birabongse - Thailand first F1 driver.

item.title: Pattaya Shooting Park
item.description: Largest outdoor shooting range in Pattaya. Diverse firearms (.22, .38, .45, 9mm, shotguns). Free hotel pickup in most packages.

item.title: Dragon Shooting Club Pattaya
item.description: Largest indoor shooting range in Thailand. 20 standard + 3 private VIP lanes. Modern firearms. Fully air-conditioned.

item.title: Tarzan Adventure Pattaya (Zipline)
item.description: Pattaya jungle zipline park. 25-platform full course + half + kids. Bridges, ladders, abseil, ropes. Near Golden Cliff Temple.

item.title: Pattaya Kart Speedway
item.description: First karting track in Pattaya — 1987, 35+ years. Two tracks (450m beginner + 750m pro). Multi-activity compound: ATV + paintball + bungee.

item.title: ATV & Off-Road Tours Pattaya
item.description: Multiple ATV/Buggy/Enduro tour operators east of Pattaya. Polaris ATVs + 500cc CF MOTO + 660cc Buggies. Beginner to extreme tours. Hotel pickup free.

item.title: Flight of the Gibbon — Khao Kheow Canopy
item.description: Largest canopy zipline in Thailand. 3 km course, 24 platforms. Inside Khao Kheow Open Zoo wildlife sanctuary. 2.5-hour zipline + zoo + lunch all-inclusive day.

item.title: Pattaya Sky Ride — Helicopter Tours
item.description: Pattaya helicopter sightseeing + Bangkok-Pattaya charter (45-min). Airbus EC-135 + EC-130 aircraft. Up to 6 passengers. 129,200 THB Bangkok-Pattaya charter.
